content:
# Two Scale Continuum

**Summary**: A modeling approach that links pore-scale physics to Darcy-scale variables.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-aboluhom|Aboluhom, 2022]] implemented a two-scale continuum model to capture wormhole growth and dissolution progression.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-aboluhom|Aboluhom, 2022]] TSC models are widely used to avoid the over-simplification of standard Darcy-scale models while avoiding the complexity of pore-scale simulations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-aboluhom|Aboluhom, 2022]] Coupling Darcy-scale flow with pore-scale property updates.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The TSC model proved its accuracy in estimating breakthrough volumes and capturing wormhole growth. ([[2022-aboluhom|Aboluhom, 2022, p. 31]])
